authorization: Authorize S14-D1 SEAL review/revision plan only.

dr10_v2_applicability_only_to_s14_plus_n.binding_scope: new candidate_record_ids authored at or after DR10 v2 SEAL (78cd22e)

required_disclosure_format.failure_mode: if any of low/central/high exceeds 5%, candidate FIRES DR10 v2 at P6.5; SEAL turn should not proceed without mitigation (DA3=C or universe reduction or alternative)

required_steps: Compute contracts_per_trade per instrument: floor(per_trade_risk_usd / (ATR_per_instrument * tick_value_per_instrument))
Compute per_trade_cost per instrument: 2 * (commission_per_contract * contracts + slippage_ticks * tick_value * contracts)
Compute trades_per_year per instrument (PLAN-time estimate band: low / central / high)
Compute annual_dollar_cost per instrument: trades_per_year * per_trade_cost
Apply S2 cost-stress multiplier (1.5x per s13-d1 baseline)
Compute S2_cost_drag = total_annual_cost / START_CASH (or basket equity)
Re-compute at low/central/high estimate band; ALL THREE must clear 5% threshold for SEAL-time DR10-v2 reachability claim
sensitivity_analysis_required: Optionally DA3=D (0.125%) if margin is desired

k9_reachability_table_at_conservative_in.binding_disclosure: at conservative 30% independence, OOS K9 FAILS (72 trades < 100 threshold); REC1-equivalent disposition mandates DR1 INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD or PARK at OOS

da3_per_trade_risk_pct_is_the_structural.finding: DA3 (per-trade risk %) reduces per_trade_cost without reducing signal density; this breaks the linear-scaling-with-capital structural identity and produces real cost_drag reduction
da3_per_trade_risk_pct_is_the_structural.math: At DA3=C (0.25% risk vs DA3=B 0.5%): per_trade_cost scales 0.5x; signal density unchanged; cost_drag scales 0.5x at fixed trades_per_year and capital
da3_per_trade_risk_pct_is_the_structural.substantive_trade_off_at_da3_c: per-trade edge signal-to-noise ratio halves; K1 sharpe + K2 expectancy at P6 IS would need re-evaluation
da3_per_trade_risk_pct_is_the_structural.this_finding_implies: DA3=C is the structural DR10 v2 cost_drag mitigation lever for s14-d1 at retail-scale capital

da4_capital_scaling_does_not_reduce_cost.finding: cost_drag ratio is invariant under proportional capital scaling because per_trade_cost scales linearly with contracts which scale linearly with capital at constant risk_pct
da4_capital_scaling_does_not_reduce_cost.math: S2_cost_drag = (N_trades * per_trade_cost) / capital; per_trade_cost ~ capital (at constant risk_pct); therefore S2_cost_drag is approximately constant in capital
da4_capital_scaling_does_not_reduce_cost.this_finding_implies: DA4=C is NOT a meaningful DR10 v2 cost_drag mitigation lever in the way parallel PLAN section 10.3 implies

k9_oos_reachability_depends_on_independe.finding: parallel's 70% independence assumption produces K9-OOS clearance with 1.68x margin; this margin shrinks to 1.20x at 50% independence and FAILS K9 at 30% independence
k9_oos_reachability_depends_on_independe.this_finding_implies: K9-OOS reachability claim is not robust without conservative-band re-disclosure

recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.interpretation_consequence: At P6 IS, primary verdict criterion = framework gate clearance (K9 + DR10 v2 + other K/DR). Edge significance (sharpe magnitude, expectancy magnitude) is secondary - candidate is not expected to outperform s13-d1's weak +0.1076 sharpe in absolute terms; it is expected to clear the framework gates that s13-d1 failed under v1.
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.rationale: PLAN at 5376de7 does not explicitly state which of edge-discovery / strategy-validation / framework-reachability-test the candidate occupies. Without explicit framing, observed metrics at P6 IS could be interpreted ambiguously, leading to unclear downstream advancement criteria. Operator's selection-criteria item 9 requires this declaration explicitly.
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.revision_label: Declare candidate primary purpose as FRAMEWORK_REACHABILITY_TEST with secondary STRATEGY_VALIDATION
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.substantive_argument: s14-d1 is structurally a framework-reachability test (does DR10 v2 AND-conjunction permit a candidate that would fail under v1? does K9 reachability hold on multi-instrument basket at retail-scale?). The mechanic family (RSI(2) bi-directional) was already proven economically profitable on single MNQ.c.0 in s13-d1 (S0 net PnL +$102k; sharpe +0.1076; expectancy +$540.73). The multi-instrument extension at DA4=B is primarily a test of whether the new framework + scope clears framework gates - not a fresh edge-discovery exercise.

recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.rationale: Parallel PLAN section 10.2 estimates S2 cost_drag at DA4=B as '~4-5%' via doubling s13-d1's 2.35%. The review at b00cef4 audit section 4.2 recomputes central case at 5.71% (just above 5% threshold; FIRES). The estimation methodology is too coarse for a load-bearing reachability decision.
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.revision_label: Recompute cost_drag at SEAL with explicit per-instrument per-trade dollar arithmetic

per_instrument_components: trades_per_year_per_instrument (from PLAN-time estimate or P6 IS observed)
required_disclosure_at_seal: per-instrument trade count estimate at PLAN time (low/central/high band)
per-instrument per-trade dollar cost at DA3 + DA4 choices
summed annual cost dollars / START_CASH = S2 cost_drag ratio
comparison to 5.00% threshold with margin/distance reported
specific_arithmetic_required_at_seal.s2_multiplier: S2 cost-stress applies the 1.5x multiplier to commission/fees/slippage (carried byte-equivalent from s13-d1 cost matrix)

da3_c_da4_b_combined.reasoning: DA3=C is the structural lever; DA4=B preserved per PLAN's locked choice; combination clears DR10 v2 cost_drag at 2.85% central

da4_c_200k_cash.da4_c_central_cost_drag: 5.70% (essentially identical to DA4=B 5.71%; differs only by rounding)
da4_c_200k_cash.operator_choice_at_seal: NOT_RECOMMENDED as primary lever; can be combined with DA3=C if additional margin desired
da4_c_200k_cash.reasoning: capital-invariant ratio; not a meaningful lever

reduce_universe_to_3_symbols.reasoning: smaller basket reduces total cost flow; requires fresh candidate_record_id per PLAN section 3.2; not strictly a SEAL-revision but a fresh-PLAN-turn requirement

da3_c_arithmetic.k9_impact_of_da3_c: NONE (signal density unchanged; only per-trade contract count changes)

recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.da3_c_substantive_trade_off: Halving per-trade notional reduces per-trade edge signal-to-noise ratio. s13-d1 at DA3=B observed +$540.73 expectancy per trade; at DA3=C this would scale to ~$270 per trade. K9 unchanged; edge significance (K1 sharpe + K2 expectancy) would need re-evaluation at P6 IS with smaller per-trade signal.
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.rationale: KEY FINDING from review at b00cef4 audit section 4.3: cost_drag = (trades * per_trade_cost) / capital is INVARIANT under proportional capital scaling because per_trade_cost scales linearly with contracts which scale linearly with capital at constant risk_pct. Therefore DA4=C ($200k) does NOT meaningfully reduce S2 cost_drag from DA4=B ($100k) - both give ~5.71% at central estimate. Parallel PLAN identifies DA4 as primary mitigation lever; this is structurally incorrect.
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.revision_label: Use DA3=C (0.25% per-trade risk) as the structural DR10 v2 cost_drag mitigation lever (NOT DA4 capital scaling)

conservative_k9_reachability_table_requi.binding_scenario_to_pre_disclose: 30% independence with OOS K9 status FAILS (72 < 100); per REC1-equivalent, OOS K9 sub-threshold disposition must be DR1 INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD or PARK_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE
conservative_k9_reachability_table_requi.empirical_independence_pilot_optional: At SEAL or P3 BUILD, an independence pilot using s13-d1's MNQ.c.0 signal log could provide an empirical anchor for the independence assumption (use s13-d1's signal log + a synthetic per-instrument signal projection); this is optional and not authorized by this plan

oos_k9_subthreshold_contingency.alternative_disposition: PARK_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE (analogous to s10-D2 / s12-d1 park precedents)
oos_k9_subthreshold_contingency.chain_responsibility: if OOS K9 fires, parallel chain seals the INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE verdict; PARK chains the candidate; no DR rule redefinition; no s14-d1 _revN_
forbidden_dispositions: ignore OOS K9 in favor of IS K9 clearance
resize per-trade risk post-seal to inflate trade count

recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.rationale: Parallel PLAN section 9.2 assumes 70% effective signal independence across 4 highly-correlated equity-index micro-futures without independent justification. Parallel's own K10 estimate (table 14.1) predicts avg pairwise correlation 0.7-0.9, which would imply much lower effective independence (~30-50%). Review at b00cef4 audit section 3.2 shows K9-OOS margin shrinks from claimed 2-4x at 70% independence to 1.20x at 50% and BELOW threshold at 30%.
recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.revision_label: Re-disclose K9-OOS reachability margin at conservative independence band (30-50%) including OOS K9 sub-threshold contingency

recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.rationale: Parallel PLAN section 19 mentions T2 rev2 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) as co-recommended alternative (43/60 score tied with s14-d1) but does not provide direct quantitative comparison on K9 / DR10 v2 / cost_drag metrics. Operator selected s14-d1 over T2 rev2 at the parallel selection-plan layer without this transparency.

required_comparison_table_at_seal.purpose: Allows operator to see the explicit trade-off between (a) s14-d1's reuse-of-MNQ + parallel-mechanic-continuity benefit vs new MES/MYM/M2K data layer + borderline DR10 v2 status, and (b) T2 rev2's structurally cleaner DR10 v2 clearance + sub-fractional sizing + new cash-equity data layer + new regulatory regime

recommended_seal_revisions_A_through_E.revision_label: Provide direct K9/DR10/cost_drag comparison with T2 rev2 cash-equity basket for opportunity-cost transparency

review_recommendation_carried.text: PROCEED WITH S14-D1 PLAN CONDITIONAL ON DA3 + COST_DRAG GATE BEING TIGHTENED AT SEAL

seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(",",":"), ensure_ascii=False) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method

source_anchors.parallel_availability_probe_runbook_trea: informational; addresses upstream availability-gate phase; does not overlap SEAL-revision recommendations in this plan
